content.problemStatement:
Chef gave a series of 333 exams, and scored XXX, YYY and ZZZ in them respectively, out of 100100100 marks each.

Chef needs to get 505050 or more marks in at least 222 out of 333 exams to pass. Determine if Chef passed.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first line contains 333 integers - XXX, YYY and ZZZ.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line Yes\text{Yes}Yes or No\text{No}No depending on whether Chef passed or not.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1: Chef scored 505050 or more marks in the first and second exams, therefore he passed.
Test Case 3 : Chef scored 505050 or more in only the third exam. Therefore, he did not pass.
